## Summary
Describe what this PR changes and why.

- [ ] Project spec/rubric update

List key paths.

- [ ] Internal links checked

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are measurable

Provide before/after outputs, screenshots, traces, or benchmark tables.

## Risks
Describe possible regressions or confusion points.

## Follow-ups
List any related improvements planned next.
